name: Formula One 1997
attribution: Historical data derived from f1db (github.com/f1db/f1db, CC BY 4.0)
AI ratings from the community F-V10_Gen1_96_97.xml custom-AI set ('F1 1997 Custom AI'), matching the F1_Season_1997 skinpack (F1_1997HC)
notes: Coverage: f1db 1997 entrant Ricardo Rosset (lola+ford, rounds 1) has no livery in the referenced skinpack/AI set and is not included in this pack.
Coverage: f1db 1997 entrant Vincenzo Sospiri (lola+ford, rounds 1) has no livery in the referenced skinpack/AI set and is not included in this pack.

The source custom-AI XML (F-V10_Gen1_96_97.xml) is a dual-season 1996+1997 set; only its '1997 ...' livery entries are bound by this pack. The '1996 ...' entries and the what-if liveries (A. Senna, A. Prost, N. Mansell, M. Brundle, and the alternate champion-numbering Williams/Arrows cars) are not part of the 1997 season.

Authored livery selection: where the source XML offers alternate liveries for the same driver and team, the livery whose car number matches the driver's real 1997 race number is bound — '1997 Williams #3 - J. Villeneuve' over the what-if '1997 Williams #2 - J. Villeneuve', '1997 Arrows #2 - P. Diniz' over '1997 Arrows #4 - P. Diniz'.
Authored team reliability: the source XML's 1997 base entries carry no vehicle_reliability, so team reliability is derived from f1db 1997 mechanical retirement rates (1 - mechanical DNFs / starts).

Authored wetSkill: the source XML's 1997 entries do not author wet_skill (the community file leaves the in-game default), but the pack format requires it. Each driver's value is taken from the same author's 1996 entry in the same file where one exists; the eight 1997 rookies/substitutes without a 1996 entry (R. Schumacher, Wurz, Trulli, Nakano, Larini, Morbidelli, Fontana, Magnussen) are authored on the same scale.

The two-car Lola team (V. Sospiri / R. Rosset, round 1 only, both DNQ) is covered by the installed F-V10_Gen1_97_Lola.xml variant (byte-identical to the active F-V10_Gen1.xml) and the deployed 24_Lola/25_Lola liveries on the mclaren_mp4_12 model; this pack follows the season-named F-V10_Gen1_96_97.xml, which carries no Lola entries. The F-V10_Gen1_97_Lotus.xml variant is a what-if Lotus pairing (B. Gachot / H. Noda) and is not represented.

The source custom-AI XML carries a large per-track (tracks="...") override set (568 entries, including negative vehicle_reliability values that script real 1997 retirements); those patches are not carried into this pack's aiOverrides in this version.
